channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Five design tricks to make a small home appear larger
item.description: Living in a small space doesn't have to feel cramped. Interior designers share creative strategies to create the illusion of more room.

item.title: Andy Burnham becomes the new UK prime minister
item.description: On Monday, former Manchester Mayor Andy Burnham succeeds Keir Starmer as the United Kingdom's prime minister. His politics have been shaped by experience.

item.title: Overnight Russian attack on Ukraine kills several, targets Kyiv
item.description: Ukraine's air force reported that Russia launched 41 missiles and 125 attack drones overnight.

item.title: Violence frequently occurs in dementia care despite regulatory warnings
item.description: Nursing homes and assisted living facilities often see violence among dementia patients, including fatal incidents, court records show.
